title: [phase:critique] [family:live-endpoints] [provider_hint:codex] Summarize the exact live Stripe endpoint status for Content Analyzer production from current evidence: create-checkout-session, customer-portal, stripe-webhook. Return 3 bullets only.
summary_text: - `POST https://haaxgwyimoqzzxzdaeep.supabase.co/functions/v1/create-checkout-session`: implemented as a Supabase Edge Function and called by the production client, with auth required plus Stripe price ID validation; current repo evidence shows it is wired for live use, but does not prove production Stripe secrets/price IDs are actually set or that the endpoint was successfully exercised. - `POST https://haaxgwyimoqzzxzdaeep.supabase.co/functions/v1/customer-portal`: implemented as a Supabase Edge Function and called by the production client, with auth required and a stored `stripe_customer_id` prerequisite; current evidence shows the live route exists in code, but not a verified successful production invocation. - `POST https://haaxgwyimoqzzxzdaeep.supabase.co/functions/v1/stripe-webhook`: implemented as a Supabase Edge Function and explicitly documented as the Stripe webhook target, with signature verification and subscription/user state updates; current evidence confirms the exact live endpoint path and handler logic, but not that Stripe is currently configured to send production events to it.
